style_summary: A quiet analog-future editorial poster style using warm cream paper, oversized black neo-grotesk typography, strict grid rules, retro technology still life, pale-blue translucent interface panels, botanical foreground accents, and tiny bilingual information design.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main person, field, discipline, audience, or symbolic focus
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: what the system helps the subject do or understand
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: retro-future device, workstation, instrument, archive object, display, console, or product-like prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: studio, archive desk, greenhouse lab, civic model room, classroom, clinic, observatory, or quiet workspace
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: paper texture, thin rules, metadata blocks, issue date, numbered list, botanical details, translucent UI panel, dotted halftone, small crosshair marks
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small bilingual caption, numbered benefit list, issue/date label, or editorial microcopy
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: thin line, plus sign, bracketed number, crosshair star, dotted square, or small separator
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: if people appear: quiet utilitarian studio clothing, lab coat, soft workwear, or minimal neutral layers

composition.grid: strict editorial grid with generous margins, top rule, corner metadata, lower information band, and large negative space
composition.headline: oversized black neo-grotesk headline, usually left or upper-left, stacked in short lines
composition.hero_object: single tactile retro-future technology object staged in the lower-right or lower half
composition.interface: pale-blue translucent panel floating over or near the hero object
composition.botanical_layer: delicate blue and green foreground flowers or stems crossing the device edge
composition.microcopy: small bilingual labels, issue/date blocks, bracketed numbered lists, and compact captions

typography.headline: heavy black neo-grotesk sans-serif, tight and modern, very large relative to the page
typography.supporting_text: small editorial sans-serif, sparse, carefully aligned, often bilingual
typography.graphic_text: numbered list labels, date blocks, issue marks, plus signs, and section captions
typography.avoid: handwriting, decorative display fonts, script, dense paragraphs, logo-like marks

image_treatment.medium: poster-like editorial still life with realistic product depth and illustrated/painted botanical overlay
image_treatment.texture: warm paper grain, subtle scan noise, matte plastic, soft shadows, lightly aged print finish
image_treatment.lighting: soft diffused daylight with quiet screen glow
image_treatment.mood: calm, literate, humane, optimistic, precise, contemplative

do: Use a strict editorial grid and large quiet margins.
Anchor the image with one huge black sans-serif headline.
Stage one retro-future device or workstation as a tactile object.
Add pale-blue translucent UI details sparingly.
Use botanical forms to soften the technological subject.
Keep microcopy precise, tiny, and aligned.
Use warm paper grain and gentle shadows.
